warm_up:
1 round
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
15 Plate I Y T
15 Plate Shoulder Press
15 Push Ups
30sec Cobra Stretch

strength.name: Bench Press
strength.description:
5x5 | * Slide the wheely chair back, Heels to floor
* Break the bar, pull bar apart
* Keep breathe in the whole rep | E3MOM 21min
BUILD 2 Sets
00:00 10 @ 55%
03:00 8 @ 65%
HOLD 5 Sets
06:00 5 @ 75%
09:00 5 @ 75%
12:00 5 @ 75%
15:00 5 @ 75%
18:00 5 @ 75%

gymnastics:
Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min
Max Reps (aim to keep the same reps throughout each set)
Aim for 1 more rep than last week

hypertrophy.reasoning: Bench and pull-ups dominate pressing and vertical pulling; accessory work addresses horizontal back, rear delts, and arm balance.
suggested_exercises: Reverse pec deck or face pulls: 3x12–15
Seal rows or machine rows (lower lat emphasis): 3x10–12
Pallof press or landmine rotations: 3x10 each side

siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Bench Press, 5 by 5 at 75 percent. Gymnastics: Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min. For hypertrophy, focus on rear deltoids, back (lower lats), triceps.
